content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "K-Complete Word". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1332/problem/C
constraints: s consists only of lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers n and k. The second line contains a string s of length n.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the lexicographically smallest string that can be obtained by changing at most k characters in the string s to 'a' or 'b'.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Iterate over the string and change characters to 'a' or 'b' based on the minimum number of changes required to make the string k-complete.
